hook.text: If you are getting endo surgery, always ask for photos Here is why

main_claim.text: Always ask for your surgical photos after a laparoscopy—they are your medical records and can reveal missed endometriosis when reviewed by a specialist.

supporting_explanation.summary: Surgeons can record and take photos during surgery. Patients are entitled to copies. Specialists with training can spot subtle lesions that were overlooked. Photos help patients visualize their disease and understand symptoms.

funnel_rationale: Broad educational content raising awareness about a specific actionable step for anyone undergoing endometriosis surgery.

cta.value_exchange_raw: specialist review of your surgical photos
